GoGo Chiang Mai

    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P Q R S T U V W X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    addEntity(Node, int, int) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Adds an entity sprite to the game board at the given tile coordinates.
    addPower() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Increments the spell damage multiplier by one.
    AngryTeacher - Class in logic.entity
    A fast, aggressive teacher that can walk through quest-mark and item tiles.
    AngryTeacher() - Constructor for class logic.entity.AngryTeacher
    Creates an AngryTeacher with its default sprite and stats.
    answerQuestion() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Opens the question popup if the student is standing on a QuestionMark tile.
    application - package application
    JavaFX entry point.
    applyBackgroundImage(Pane, String) - Static method in class gui.util.GuiUtils
    Sets a full-cover background image on the given pane, stretching to fill without repeating.
    applySlow(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Adds slow ticks, freezing this teacher for the given number of game ticks.
    ArcaneScholar - Class in logic.character.boy
    Boy scholar with the blue (ice) element — high HP, moderate focus gain.
    ArcaneScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.boy.ArcaneScholar
    Creates the Arcane Scholar (boy-blue) character profile.
    availableCharacters() - Static method in class logic.character.CharacterRoster
    Returns all eight playable character profiles in their default order.

    B

    BaseCharacterProfile - Class in logic.character
    Shared implementation of CharacterProfile that derives all resource paths from the character's gender and element.
    BaseCharacterProfile(String, String, String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
    Initialises all fields, auto-deriving image paths from gender and element.
    BaseTeacher - Class in logic.entity
    Base class for all teacher enemy types in the game.
    BaseTeacher(String, int, int) - Constructor for class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Initialises a teacher at a random spawner tile with the given stats.
    BulletItem - Class in logic.entity
    A collectible ammo item that spawns on item tiles and grants one spell shot.
    BulletItem() - Constructor for class logic.entity.BulletItem
    Creates a BulletItem at a random item-spawn tile and starts its rotation animation.

    C

    canMoveTo(int, int, Map) - Method in class logic.entity.AngryTeacher
     
    canMoveTo(int, int, Map) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    CellPane - Class in gui.component
    A single 40×40 pixel tile in the 20×20 game board grid.
    CellPane(int, int) - Constructor for class gui.component.CellPane
    Creates a tile pane with the correct background for the given tile type.
    CharacterProfile - Interface in logic.character
    Read-only description of one selectable scholar.
    CharacterRoster - Class in logic.character
    Static registry of all eight selectable scholar characters.
    CharacterSelectPane - Class in gui.battle
    Character selection screen shown between level selection and the game start.
    CharacterSelectPane(int) - Constructor for class gui.battle.CharacterSelectPane
    Constructs the character selection screen for the given level.
    chooseSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    clickSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    collectSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    correctSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    countSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    createButton(String, Runnable) - Static method in class gui.util.GuiUtils
    Creates a styled game button with hover animation and click sound.

    D

    Directions - Enum Class in logic.contract
    Cardinal directions used for player input, projectile travel, and AI pathfinding.
    displayName() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    displayName() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Display name shown in the character selection screen.
    DOWN - Enum constant in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Move one tile downward (increasing Y).

    E

    element() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    element() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Element key that determines spell damage, slow, and visual effect ("red", "blue", "green", or "purple").
    Escape Intania Game - Search tag in Overview
    Section

    F

    focusGainPerCorrectAnswer() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    focusGainPerCorrectAnswer() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Amount of focus gained each time the player answers a question correctly.
    forGender(String) - Static method in class logic.character.CharacterRoster
    Filters the full roster to characters of the given gender.

    G

    GamePane - Class in gui.screen
    The primary gameplay screen that renders the tile grid and drives the game loop.
    GameSystem - Class in logic.world
    Singleton that owns all mutable game state for the current play session.
    gender() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    gender() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Gender key used for resource path construction ("boy" or "girl").
    getBullets() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getBulletsCount() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns the number of spell shots remaining.
    getCorrectOptionIndex() - Method in class logic.world.Question
     
    getCurrentLevel() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getCurrentMap() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getDistanceAfterMove(int, int, int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Returns the squared Euclidean distance to (targetX, targetY) after hypothetically stepping one tile in the given direction.
    getHp() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Returns the teacher's current hit points.
    getHp() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns the current hit points.
    getImage(String) - Static method in class io.resource.ResourceManager
    Returns the cached Image for the given path, loading it on first access.
    getImageView() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Returns the JavaFX node used to render this teacher on the game board.
    getImageView() - Method in class logic.entity.BulletItem
    Returns the JavaFX node used to render this item on the game board.
    getImageView() - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
     
    getImageView() - Method in class logic.entity.SpellShot
     
    getImageView() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns the JavaFX node used to render the student on the game board.
    getInstance() - Static method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Returns the singleton GamePane, creating it on first call.
    getInstance() - Static method in class gui.screen.HomePane
    Returns the singleton HomePane, creating it on first call.
    getInstance() - Static method in class gui.screen.HowToPlayPane
    Returns the singleton HowToPlayPane, creating it on first call.
    getInstance() - Static method in class gui.screen.LevelPane
    Returns the singleton LevelPane, creating it on first call.
    getInstance() - Static method in class logic.world.GameSystem
    Returns the singleton instance, creating it on first call.
    getItemPositions() - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    getName() - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    getOptions() - Method in class logic.world.Question
     
    getPower() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns the spell damage multiplier (increases as the student answers questions correctly).
    getPrompt() - Method in class logic.world.Question
     
    getQuestionData() - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
     
    getQuestions() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getQuestPositions() - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    getSelectedCharacter() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getSpawnPositions() - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    getSpells() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getStudent() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getTargetDirections(Map, BaseTeacher) - Method in interface logic.contract.Pursuer
    Returns the teacher's valid move directions sorted by ascending distance to the player, so get(0) is always the direction that closes the gap.
    getTeachers() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    getTiles() - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    getValidDirections(Map) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Returns the set of directions the teacher may move in without entering a wall, empty tile, or going out of bounds.
    getX() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Returns the column position on the tile grid.
    getX() - Method in class logic.entity.BulletItem
    Returns the item's column position on the tile grid.
    getX() - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
     
    getX() - Method in class logic.entity.SpellShot
     
    getX() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns the student's current column position on the tile grid.
    getY() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Returns the row position on the tile grid.
    getY() - Method in class logic.entity.BulletItem
    Returns the item's row position on the tile grid.
    getY() - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
     
    getY() - Method in class logic.entity.SpellShot
     
    getY() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns the student's current row position on the tile grid.
    GirlBlueScholar - Class in logic.character.girl
    Girl scholar with the blue (ice) element — high HP, moderate focus gain.
    GirlBlueScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.girl.GirlBlueScholar
    Creates the Girl Blue Scholar (girl-blue) character profile.
    GirlGreenScholar - Class in logic.character.girl
    Girl scholar with the green (earth) element — balanced stats.
    GirlGreenScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.girl.GirlGreenScholar
    Creates the Girl Green Scholar (girl-green) character profile.
    GirlPurpleScholar - Class in logic.character.girl
    Girl scholar with the purple (dark) element — above-average HP.
    GirlPurpleScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.girl.GirlPurpleScholar
    Creates the Girl Purple Scholar (girl-purple) character profile.
    GirlRedScholar - Class in logic.character.girl
    Girl scholar with the red (fire) element — glass-cannon profile.
    GirlRedScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.girl.GirlRedScholar
    Creates the Girl Red Scholar (girl-red) character profile.
    GreenScholar - Class in logic.character.boy
    Boy scholar with the green (earth) element — balanced stats.
    GreenScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.boy.GreenScholar
    Creates the Green Scholar (boy-green) character profile.
    gui.battle - package gui.battle
    Character-selection flow.
    gui.component - package gui.component
    Small reusable JavaFX widgets that are smaller than a full screen.
    gui.screen - package gui.screen
    Singleton screens swapped in via application.Main.setRoot(...).
    gui.util - package gui.util
    Shared UI helpers: sound clips, the pixel font, the standard back-button factory, and the background-image utility used by every screen.
    GuiUtils - Class in gui.util
    Shared UI utilities: pre-loaded sound effects, the custom pixel font, and factory methods for styled buttons and background images.
    GuiUtils() - Constructor for class gui.util.GuiUtils
     

    H

    hitSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    HomePane - Class in gui.screen
    The game's home / title screen.
    HowToPlayPane - Class in gui.screen
    Scrollable "How to Play" instructions screen.
    hp - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     

    I

    id() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    id() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Unique identifier for this character (e.g.
    imageView - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    Interactable - Interface in logic.contract
    Marks a game object that can be triggered by the player or a spell.
    io.parser - package io.parser
    Plain-text parsers for level data.
    io.resource - package io.resource
    Singleton image cache.
    isActive() - Method in class logic.entity.SpellShot
    Returns whether this spell is still travelling.
    isDead() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Returns true when the student's HP has reached zero.
    isGameActive() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
     
    isPaused() - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Returns whether the game loop is currently paused.

    L

    LEFT - Enum constant in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Move one tile to the left (decreasing X).
    LevelPane - Class in gui.screen
    Level-selection screen showing available map levels.
    loadLevel(int) - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
    Clears all entity lists, loads the map and questions for the given level, starts the level background music, and spawns the student at (1,1).
    logic.character - package logic.character
    Selectable scholar profiles.
    logic.character.boy - package logic.character.boy
    Male scholar implementations: ArcaneScholar (blue / ice), GreenScholar (earth), PurpleScholar (dark), RedScholar (fire).
    logic.character.girl - package logic.character.girl
    Female scholar implementations: GirlBlueScholar, GirlGreenScholar, GirlPurpleScholar, GirlRedScholar.
    logic.contract - package logic.contract
    Cross-cutting contracts that other packages depend on.
    logic.entity - package logic.entity
    Active game entities updated each tick by GamePane.setupGameLoops().
    logic.world - package logic.world
    Global game state and per-level data.
    loseSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
     
    Main - Class in application
    JavaFX application entry point for GoGo Chiang Mai — Escape Intania.
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    Map - Class in logic.world
    Immutable data record for one game level's tile layout and point-of-interest positions.
    Map(String, List<List<Integer>>, List<List<Integer>>, List<List<Integer>>, List<List<Integer>>) - Constructor for class logic.world.Map
    Constructs a Map with all tile and position data.
    MapParser - Class in io.parser
    Parses a plain-text level map file from the classpath into a Map object.
    MapParser() - Constructor for class io.parser.MapParser
     
    MAX_HP - Static variable in class logic.entity.Student
    Maximum hit points for the student.
    maxHp() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    maxHp() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Maximum hit points for this character.
    move() - Method in interface logic.contract.Moveable
    Executes one movement step on the tile grid.
    move() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    Moveable - Interface in logic.contract
    Marks a game entity that can move on the tile grid each tick.
    moveDirection - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    moveFrequency - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     

    N

    NONE - Enum constant in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    No direction queued; entity skips movement for this tick.
    NormalTeacher - Class in logic.entity
    A balanced chasing teacher that actively pursues the student.
    NormalTeacher() - Constructor for class logic.entity.NormalTeacher
    Creates a NormalTeacher with its default sprite and stats.
    npcResource() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    npcResource() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Top-down NPC sprite path — used for the student tile on the game board.

    O

    onInteract() - Method in interface logic.contract.Interactable
    Called when the player or a projectile enters the object's tile.
    onInteract() - Method in class logic.entity.BulletItem
    Plays the collection sound when the student picks up this item.
    onInteract() - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
    Plays the pop sound when the player interacts with this terminal.
    onInteract() - Method in class logic.entity.SpellShot
    Plays the shoot sound when the student fires this spell.

    P

    pixelFont - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    playBackgroundMusic(String, double) - Static method in class application.Main
    Stops any currently playing background music and starts a new track.
    popSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    portraitResource() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    portraitResource() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Walk sprite sheet path — shown in character select and battle screens.
    Project layout - Search tag in Overview
    Section
    PurpleScholar - Class in logic.character.boy
    Boy scholar with the purple (dark) element — above-average HP.
    PurpleScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.boy.PurpleScholar
    Creates the Purple Scholar (boy-purple) character profile.
    Pursuer - Interface in logic.contract
    Mixin that provides greedy-chase pathfinding to a teacher.

    Q

    Question - Class in logic.world
    Immutable record for a single multiple-choice quiz question.
    Question(String, List<String>, int) - Constructor for class logic.world.Question
    Constructs an immutable question record.
    QuestionMark - Class in logic.entity
    An interactive computer terminal placed on quest tiles that presents a Java OOP question to the player.
    QuestionMark(int, int, Question, int) - Constructor for class logic.entity.QuestionMark
    Creates a QuestionMark at the given tile position with the provided question data.
    QuestionParser - Class in io.parser
    Parses a plain-text question file from the classpath into a list of Question objects.
    QuestionParser() - Constructor for class io.parser.QuestionParser
     

    R

    rand - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    readFile(String) - Static method in class io.parser.MapParser
    Reads and parses the map file at the given classpath location.
    readFile(String) - Static method in class io.parser.QuestionParser
    Reads and parses the question file at the given classpath location.
    RedScholar - Class in logic.character.boy
    Boy scholar with the red (fire) element — glass-cannon profile.
    RedScholar() - Constructor for class logic.character.boy.RedScholar
    Creates the Red Scholar (boy-red) character profile.
    refreshView() - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Rebuilds the 20×20 tile grid and re-adds all entity sprites for the currently loaded level.
    removeEntity(Node) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Removes an entity sprite from the game board.
    ResourceManager - Class in io.resource
    Simple classpath image cache that avoids loading the same image more than once.
    ResourceManager() - Constructor for class io.resource.ResourceManager
     
    RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Move one tile to the right (increasing X).

    S

    setDirection(Directions) - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Sets the movement direction for the next tick.
    setGameActive(boolean) - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
    Sets the game-active flag; pass false to signal the game loop to stop.
    setHp(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Sets HP, clamping to a minimum of 0.
    setImage(String) - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Replaces the student's on-screen sprite with the image at the given path.
    setItemPositions(List<List<Integer>>) - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    setMoveDirection(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Overrides the current movement direction code.
    setName(String) - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    setPaused(boolean) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Sets the paused state of the game loop.
    setQuestPositions(List<List<Integer>>) - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    setRoot(Parent) - Static method in class application.Main
    Replaces the root of the primary scene, effectively switching screens.
    setSelectedCharacter(CharacterProfile) - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
    Records the character chosen by the player before the game starts.
    setSpawnPositions(List<List<Integer>>) - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    setTiles(List<List<Integer>>) - Method in class logic.world.Map
     
    setWaitTime(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Resets the internal tick counter used to throttle movement.
    setX(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Sets the teacher's column position on the tile grid.
    setX(int) - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
     
    setY(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Sets the teacher's row position on the tile grid.
    setY(int) - Method in class logic.entity.QuestionMark
     
    shoot() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Fires a spell in lastDirection using the selected character's element.
    shootSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    showQuestionPopup(QuestionMark) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Pauses the game and displays the retro question popup for the given terminal.
    SleepyTeacher - Class in logic.entity
    A slow, high-HP chasing teacher that relentlessly pursues the student.
    SleepyTeacher() - Constructor for class logic.entity.SleepyTeacher
    Creates a SleepyTeacher with its default sprite and stats.
    slowTicks - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    spawnBullet() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
    Spawns a BulletItem at a random item tile and adds its sprite to the game board.
    spawnTeacher() - Method in class logic.world.GameSystem
    Spawns a random teacher at a spawner tile if fewer than 5 teachers are currently active.
    spellResource() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    spellResource() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Spell-cast sprite sheet path — shown in character select element cards.
    SpellShot - Class in logic.entity
    A projectile fired by the student that travels one tile per game tick until it hits a wall or a teacher.
    SpellShot(int, int, String, String) - Constructor for class logic.entity.SpellShot
    Creates and positions a spell projectile, loading the element's GIF effect.
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    JavaFX lifecycle entry point — creates the scene and shows the primary stage.
    startSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    STAY - Enum constant in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Player is holding position; entity does not move but remains interactive.
    Student - Class in logic.entity
    The player-controlled character that navigates the tile map.
    Student(int, int) - Constructor for class logic.entity.Student
    Creates a student at the given tile coordinates and loads the character sprite.

    T

    takeDamage() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Applies one point of damage and starts the invincibility window.
    takeDamage(int) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Reduces this teacher's HP by the given amount (minimum 0).
    teacherSpawnSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    tryToMove() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
    Called every game tick to attempt a movement step.

    U

    UP - Enum constant in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Move one tile upward (decreasing Y).
    update() - Method in class logic.entity.SpellShot
    Advances the spell one tile in its travel direction.
    update() - Method in class logic.entity.Student
    Advances the student by one game tick: decrements invincibility, moves one tile in the current direction (if walkable), then resets direction to Directions.NONE.
    updateBullets(int) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Updates the HUD bullet counter label.
    updateHp(int) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Updates the HUD HP display using heart characters (❤ for remaining HP, ♡ for lost HP).
    updatePower(int) - Method in class gui.screen.GamePane
    Updates the HUD power label.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.contract.Directions
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    waitTime - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     
    walkResource() - Method in class logic.character.BaseCharacterProfile
     
    walkResource() - Method in interface logic.character.CharacterProfile
    Walk animation sprite sheet path.
    winSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     
    wrongSound - Static variable in class gui.util.GuiUtils
     

    X

    x - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
     

    Y

    y - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseTeacher
